#     --yaml config_pymatching.yml --save_syndrome syndromes_pymatching.txt
# 100 shots x 5 per-round slices (4 rounds of 8 stabilizer measurements +
# 9 final data-qubit measurements = 41 raw measurements per shot), plus the
# per-shot expected-corrections block.
